scripts.vercel-build: prisma migrate deploy && prisma generate && next build
scripts.schema:postgres: sed -i.bak 's/provider = "sqlite"/provider = "postgresql"/' prisma/schema.prisma && rm -rf prisma/migrations && echo '✓ Schema swapped to postgresql. Run: npx prisma migrate dev --name init'
scripts.schema:sqlite: sed -i.bak 's/provider = "postgresql"/provider = "sqlite"/' prisma/schema.prisma && rm -rf prisma/migrations && echo '✓ Schema swapped to sqlite. Run: npx prisma migrate dev --name init'
